title: NOIZYEMPIRE Email Rebuild — The 8-Step Ritual
subtitle: rsp@noizy.ai — the GoDaddy chain breaks forever
narrative: The 8-step ritual to rebuild the entire NOIZYEMPIRE email starting with rsp@noizy.ai: 1) Open Safari on iPad. 2) Go to dash.cloudflare.com. 3) noizy.ai → Email → Email Routing → Enable. 4) Create: rsp → rsplowman@icloud.com. 5) Enable Catch-all. 6) Check iCloud mail — verify the CF email. 7) github.com/signup with rsp@noizy.ai. 8) Passkey on immediately. Then step 9: Cloudflare My Profile → change login email from rsp@noizyfish.com to rsp@noizy.ai. The moment the GoDaddy circular dependency breaks forever. rsp@noizy.ai becomes the primary identity. The email empire rebuilds from here.

sensory.culture_context: The moment Robert breaks free from the GoDaddy circular dependency. rsp@noizyfish.com was the chain. rsp@noizy.ai is the key. Eight steps on an iPad and the empire rebuilds on sovereign ground.

questions: WE WILL REBUILD THE ENTIRE EMAIL NOIZYEMPIRE STARTING WITH rsp@noizy.ai
